title: R2 Data Catalog
excerpt: description: A managed Apache Iceberg data catalog built directly into R2 buckets. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. R2 Data Catalog is in **public beta**, and any developer with an [R2 subscription](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/pricing/) can start using it. Currently, outside of standard R2 storage and operations, you will not be billed for your use of R2 Data Catalog. R2 Data Catalog is a managed [Apache Iceberg ↗](https://iceberg.apache.org/) data catalog built directly into your R2 bucket.…
